# Phase 2: Adjacency Lists
# Generated by: cargo run -- --gen-phase2
# Shows outgoing neighbors for each node

================================================================================
EXAMPLE 1: Simple directed chain (basic arrow)
================================================================================

  End → (none)
  Middle → End
  Start → Middle

================================================================================
EXAMPLE 2: Multiple edges, multiple nodes
================================================================================

  A → C, B
  B → D
  C → D
  D → (none)

================================================================================
EXAMPLE 3: Labeled edges
================================================================================

  Dashboard → (none)
  Error → Login
  Login → Error, Dashboard

================================================================================
EXAMPLE 4: Edge types
================================================================================

  A → B
  B → (none)
  C → D
  D → (none)
  E → F
  F → (none)
  G → H
  H → (none)

================================================================================
EXAMPLE 5: Node shapes
================================================================================

  Circle → (none)
  Diamond → (none)
  Rectangle → (none)
  Rounded → (none)

================================================================================
EXAMPLE 6: Node attributes / styling
================================================================================

  Client → Server
  Database → Server
  Server → Client, Database

================================================================================
EXAMPLE 7: Direction — Left to Right (LR)
================================================================================

  Sink → (none)
  Source → Transform
  Transform → Sink

================================================================================
EXAMPLE 8: Direction — Top to Bottom (TD)
================================================================================

  Child A → Leaf 2, Leaf 1
  Child B → Leaf 3
  Leaf 1 → (none)
  Leaf 2 → (none)
  Leaf 3 → (none)
  Root → Child B, Child A

================================================================================
EXAMPLE 9: Direction — Bottom to Top (BT)
================================================================================

  Foundation → Structure
  Roof → (none)
  Structure → Roof

================================================================================
EXAMPLE 10: Direction — Right to Left (RL)
================================================================================

  Input → (none)
  Output → Process
  Process → Input

================================================================================
EXAMPLE 11: Subgraph / cluster grouping
================================================================================

  API Server → DB
  Browser → React App
  DB → (none)
  React App → API Server

================================================================================
EXAMPLE 12: Nested subgraphs
================================================================================

  App Server → Cache
  Cache → (none)
  Load Balancer → App Server
  User → Load Balancer

================================================================================
EXAMPLE 13: Self-loop edge
================================================================================

  Active → Idle
  Idle → Active, Idle

================================================================================
EXAMPLE 14: Mixed node shapes in one graph
================================================================================

  Done → (none)
  Is valid? → Return error, Process request
  Process request → Done
  Return error → Done

================================================================================
EXAMPLE 15: Long labels and multi-word node names
================================================================================

  Audit Log → (none)
  Session Token Store → User Authentication Service
  User Authentication Service → Audit Log, Session Token Store

================================================================================
EXAMPLE 16: Dense diamond (cross-edge) graph
================================================================================

  A → D, C, B
  B → E
  C → E
  D → F
  E → G
  F → G
  G → (none)

================================================================================
EXAMPLE 17: Disconnected components
================================================================================

  P → Q
  Q → R
  R → (none)
  X → Y
  Y → (none)

================================================================================
EXAMPLE 18: Combined — real-world CI/CD pipeline
================================================================================

  CI Build → Tests pass?
  Deploy Prod → (none)
  Deploy Staging → Smoke test?
  Docker Build → Push to Registry
  Git Push → CI Build
  Notify Failure → (none)
  Push to Registry → Deploy Staging
  Rollback → (none)
  Smoke test? → Rollback, Deploy Prod
  Tests pass? → Notify Failure, Docker Build

================================================================================
EXAMPLE 19: All edge types in one graph
================================================================================

  Confirmed → Shipped
  Delivered → Returned
  Returned → (none)
  Shipped → Warehouse
  Warehouse → Delivered

================================================================================
EXAMPLE 20: Minimal single-node graph
================================================================================

  Standalone → (none)
